content_blocks.hs_subtext: {business} helps you find addiction treatment covered by your health insurance — detox, inpatient, and outpatient. Verify your benefits for free and connect with rehab that works with your plan. Confidential, no obligation.
content_blocks.hs_photo_alt: Finding rehab that takes insurance for addiction treatment

content_blocks.fc_heading: Using Your Insurance for Addiction Treatment
content_blocks.fc_subheading: Most health plans cover rehab. {business} helps you understand and use your benefits.

columns.alt: Insurance parity protections for addiction treatment
columns.heading: Coverage Is Protected
columns.text: Federal parity laws require most health plans to cover substance-use treatment comparably to other medical care.

columns.heading: What Insurance Covers
columns.text: Detox, inpatient and residential rehab, PHP and IOP, outpatient care, and medication-assisted treatment are commonly covered.

columns.heading: Verify Before You Go
columns.text: We check your specific plan for free so you know your coverage and out-of-pocket costs up front.

steps_items.alt: Call for a free insurance benefits check
steps_items.heading: Call for a Free Benefits Check
steps_items.text: Share your insurance details. No cost, no obligation.

steps_items.alt: We verify your addiction treatment coverage
steps_items.heading: We Verify Your Coverage
steps_items.text: We confirm what your plan covers for addiction treatment and what you would pay.

steps_items.heading: Get Matched to Covered Care
steps_items.text: We connect you with treatment that works with your insurance.

steps_items.heading: Start Treatment
steps_items.text: Begin care with your benefits applied, often within days.

content_blocks.fq_heading: Rehab and Insurance — Frequently Asked Questions

fq_items.question: Does insurance cover rehab?
fq_items.answer: Most plans cover at least part of addiction treatment because of federal parity and ACA rules. The exact amount depends on your specific plan, and {business} can verify your benefits for free.

fq_items.question: What addiction treatment is covered by insurance?
fq_items.answer: Depending on your plan, coverage can include detox, inpatient and residential rehab, PHP, IOP, outpatient care, and medication-assisted treatment.

fq_items.question: How much does rehab cost with insurance?
fq_items.answer: It depends on your deductible, copay, and whether the facility is in-network. Many people pay far less than the sticker price once benefits are applied.

fq_items.question: How do I find rehab that takes my insurance?
fq_items.answer: Start by verifying your benefits. {business} confirms what your plan covers and connects you with treatment that accepts it, for free.

fq_items.question: Is {business} free and confidential?
fq_items.answer: Yes. Checking your coverage is free, private, and carries no obligation to enter treatment.

content_blocks.cb_text: Find rehab that takes your insurance today.

columns.title: About {business}
columns.text: {business} is a free service that helps people find addiction treatment covered by their health insurance. We connect individuals and families with treatment providers and advertising partners nationwide, helping you verify your benefits and find detox, inpatient, and outpatient care that works with your plan. Reaching out is confidential, with no cost or obligation. {business} is not a treatment provider or insurance company.

footer.disclaimer: Disclaimer: {business_domain} ({business}) is a free informational and referral service — not a treatment provider, medical practice, or insurance company. We help connect people with addiction-treatment providers and advertising partners; we do not provide medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment, and nothing on this site guarantees insurance coverage, admission, or any particular outcome. Insurance benefits vary by plan — always verify your own coverage. Calls may be answered by our advertising partners. Insurance carrier names and logos are trademarks of their respective owners, used for identification only; {business} is not affiliated with or endorsed by any carrier. If you or someone you know is in crisis, call or text 988 (Suicide & Crisis Lifeline), or 911 for emergencies. See our Terms and Conditions for details.
footer.sticky_bar_info: Calls are answered by our advertising partners, who can help you verify your insurance and find treatment options.

content_blocks.text:
Last updated: July 2026.

{business} ("we," "us," or "our") operates {business_domain}. This Privacy Policy explains what information we collect, how we use and share it, and the choices you have. By using our site or contacting us, you agree to this policy.

{business} is a free informational and referral service that helps people find addiction-treatment options that may be covered by their health insurance. We are not a treatment provider, medical practice, or insurance company, and we do not collect medical records or protected health information.

Information you give us: your name, phone number, email address, general location, and any details you choose to share when you call us or submit a form.

Information collected automatically: IP address, browser type, device information, pages viewed, and similar usage data, gathered through cookies and analytics tools.

Please do not send us medical records, diagnoses, or other sensitive health information.

We use your information to respond to your inquiry, help you understand your insurance benefits, connect you with treatment providers and advertising partners, operate and improve our site, and comply with law.

We may share the contact details you provide with treatment providers and advertising partners so they can assist you, and with service vendors who support our operations. We may also disclose information when required by law or to protect our rights. We do not sell your information for unrelated third-party marketing.

When you contact us or submit your information, you consent to be contacted by {business} and our advertising partners by phone, text message, and email at the number and address you provide, including through automated technology, for the purpose of discussing treatment and insurance options. Consent is not a condition of any service. Message and data rates may apply. You may opt out at any time (see "Your Choices" below).

We use cookies and similar technologies to run the site, remember preferences, and measure traffic. You can control cookies through your browser settings; disabling them may affect site functionality.

Insurance carrier names and logos are the trademarks of their respective owners and are used for identification only. {business} is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or acting on behalf of any insurance carrier. Our site may link to third-party sites we do not control and are not responsible for.

We use reasonable administrative and technical measures to protect the information we handle. No method of transmission or storage is completely secure, however, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.

You may request access to or deletion of your information, opt out of marketing calls or texts (reply STOP to texts), unsubscribe from emails, or ask to be placed on our internal Do Not Call list by contacting us at {email}.
Our site is intended for adults 18 and older. We do not knowingly collect information from children. If you believe a child has provided us information, please contact us and we will remove it.
We may update this policy from time to time; the "last updated" date reflects the latest version. Questions? Contact us at {email} or {phone}.

seo.meta_description: How {business} collects, uses, and protects your information. Read the {business} privacy policy.

content_blocks.text:
Last updated: July 2026.

These Terms and Conditions govern your use of {business_domain}, operated by {business}. By using the site or contacting us, you agree to these terms. If you do not agree, please do not use the site.

{business} is a free informational and referral service that helps connect people with addiction-treatment providers and advertising partners. We are not a treatment provider, medical or clinical practice, or an insurance company. We do not provide medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment, and we do not determine insurance coverage.

Nothing on this site is medical advice. Always consult a qualified professional about treatment decisions. If you or someone else is in crisis, call or text 988 (Suicide & Crisis Lifeline) or call 911 for emergencies.

content_blocks.heading_text: No Guarantee of Coverage or Outcomes
content_blocks.text: Insurance benefits vary by plan and are determined solely by your insurer. We do not guarantee that any treatment will be covered, that you will be admitted to any program, or that any particular result or outcome will occur. Always verify your own benefits directly with your insurer.

Some listings, calls, and content may be provided by or directed to our advertising partners, and we may be compensated when you contact a partner. Calls placed through the site may be answered by advertising partners. This compensation may affect which providers are shown.

You agree to provide accurate information and to independently verify any provider’s licensing, credentials, and your own insurance coverage before making treatment decisions. You are responsible for your interactions with any provider or partner.

Insurance carrier names and logos are trademarks of their respective owners, used here for identification only; {business} is not affiliated with or endorsed by any carrier. All other site content is owned by {business} or its licensors and may not be copied without permission.
The site and its content are provided "as is" and "as available," without warranties of any kind, express or implied, including accuracy, fitness for a particular purpose, or non-infringement.

To the fullest extent permitted by law, {business} and its owners, employees, and partners are not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the site or any provider or partner you connect with through it.
You agree to indemnify and hold harmless {business} from any claims or expenses arising out of your use of the site or your violation of these terms.

We may update these terms at any time; continued use means you accept the changes. These terms are governed by the laws of the United States and the state in which {business} operates, without regard to conflict-of-law rules. Questions? Contact us at {email} or {phone}.

seo.meta_description: The terms governing use of {business_domain}, a free addiction-treatment referral and advertising service.

Have a question, or want to check whether your insurance covers addiction treatment? We are here to help — confidentially, with no cost or obligation.

Call {phone}

Are you a treatment provider interested in joining our advertising network? Reach out at {email} and we will get back to you. Please note that {business} is a referral and advertising service, not a treatment provider or insurance company.
If you or someone you know is struggling or in danger, call or text 988 (Suicide & Crisis Lifeline), or call 911 for emergencies. Help is available 24/7.

info.heading: How Your Calls Are Handled
info.body: {business} offers a free, confidential helpline that connects you with addiction-treatment providers and advertising partners. This call-routing service is sponsored advertising. {business} is not a treatment provider or insurance company. Calls to our helpline are answered by one of our advertising partners, who can help you verify your insurance benefits and find treatment options. By calling or using {website}, you agree to our Terms and Conditions and Privacy Policy, and you consent to be contacted about treatment and coverage options. You will never be charged for these calls. Call recording & data use: calls may be recorded and your information handled as described in our Privacy Policy. If you are in crisis, call or text 988. Questions? Call {phone}.
